changes.summary: Added explicit differential-drive geometry parameters and converted observer plus closed-loop wheel reference mapping to geometry-based formulas while preserving normalized external v/w semantics.
Unified PC ASCII replies and telemetry under the existing link_proto async UART send path so runtime command responses no longer use blocking HAL_UART_Transmit.
Reworked link_proto transmit state from a single pending frame into a small shared async queue and exposed a raw-send API for the PC link.
